name: diagStartVariantIdentification
title: diagStartVariantIdentification
description: Start the automatic variant identification algorithm for the given target, or the currently selected one if none is given. The algorithm will communicate via the built-in diagnostic channel, i.e. the CAPL callback functions are not used for the identification.
A tester module may wait for the completion of the algorithm with testWaitForDiagVariantIdentificationCompleted, or query the status of the identification with diagGetIdentifiedVariant.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: ECU the identification algorithm should run for, not the currently selected one. If given, diagSetTarget does not have to be called.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
